title: Adorable Eggs
description: Play with the new Minecraft 1.21.5 egg textures in previous versions, and get new placeable plushies!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ADORABLE_EGGS/MP_ADORABLE_EGGS_Header.webp) Play with the new Minecraft 1.21.5 egg textures in previous versions, and get them in SURVIVAL to place them on the floor as plushies. That is, for example, you will have a 0.002 chance that when you kill a zombie (about 1 in 500), it will give you this egg, which you can place on the ground to make it look like a stuffed animal Place these stuffed animals in creative using shift + right click, or place them in survival using just right click (in survival the generation of creatures through these eggs is disabled). ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ADORABLE_EGGS/MP_ADORABLE_EGGS_Description.webp) You can edit the probability of a mob dropping the egg, which you can then use to place it on the ground! Anyway, the default probabilities are VERY LOW, so they are really hard to get. Approximately they are as follows: - 1/25: Allay, Armadillo, Breeze, Camel, Cat, Creaking, Dolphin, Elder Guardian, Endermite, Evoker, Fox, Iron Golem, Panda, Polar Bear, Pufferfish, Ravager, Skeleton Horse, Sniffer, Strider, Trader Llama, Wandering Trader, Warden, Zoglin and Zombie Horse. - 1/50: Axolotl, Bat, Bee, Bogged, Donkey, Frog, Ghast, Glow Squid, Goat, Guardian, Hoglin, Horse, Llama, Mooshroom, Mule, Ocelot, Parrot, Phantom, Rabbit, Shulker, Snow Golem, Stray, Tropical Fish, Turtle, Vex, Villager and Wolf. - 1/100: Blaze, Cave Spider, Husk, Piglin Brutes, Pillager, Cod, Salmon, Silverfish, Squid, Vindicator, Witch, Wither Skeleton and Zombified Villager. - 1/250: Drowned, Enderman, Piglin and Zombified Piglin. - 1/500: Sheep, Chicken, Cow, Creeper, Magma Cube, Pig, Slime, Spider, Skeleton and Zombie. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ADORABLE_EGGS/MP_ADORABLE_EGGS_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ADORABLE_EGGS/MP_ADORABLE_EGGS_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v1NZJevY/images/21e2531d828a5aa7bd680f6fbbe5d83c1c22da39.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v1NZJevY/images/3a1555491ce3a21684e33c7f5b7ad561a850df28.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v1NZJevY/images/95c5230ae2717ceab39df0185382ef389732f35c.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
